nasb.text: Moreover, the pride of Israel testifies against him, And Israel and Ephraim stumble in their iniquity; Judah also has stumbled with them.

esv.text: The pride of Israel testifies to his face; Israel and Ephraim shall stumble in his guilt; Judah also shall stumble with them.

cnv.text: 以色列的驕傲當面指證自己， 以色列和以法蓮因自己的罪孽跌倒， 猶大也與他們一同跌倒。

ccb.text: 以色列被自己的傲慢指控， 以色列和以法莲要跌倒在自己的罪中， 犹大也要一同跌倒。
